## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Otto and Growth X to discuss content updates, image designs, and publishing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New image designs with more color (orange/gold accents) were well-received; full-canvas designs preferred](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [25 new blog post topics added to content backlog, focusing on Otto's unique capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [First 4 blog posts published; Looker dashboard to be updated for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Staging of new content to begin tomorrow, with a flexible publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

## Topics

### Image Design Updates

  - [Designer incorporated more color into existing style, adding orange/gold accents to complement blues](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Jason prefers designs using the full canvas vs. those with white space](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - Images will be optimized to \<200KB for better page load times
  - [One header image size to be used consistently across homepage and articles](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)

### Content Updates and Backlog

  - [Two new pieces of content sent for review; three more on the way](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [25 new blog post topics added to content OS, focusing on Otto's unique capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Topics include booking flights and hotels simultaneously, multi-city travel, loyalty programs](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Mix of high and low volume keywords, including educational content for lesser-known features](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [New "Approved" checkbox added in Airtable for easier content selection](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

### Publishing Process and Strategy

  - [Growth X to stage content in Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Otto team to review and publish initially, with potential for Growth X to take over in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Flexible publishing schedule, likely towards end of week (Thursdays/Fridays)](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Google indexing to be monitored; manual submission if needed after a few days](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### Blog Structure and Categories

  - [Existing CMS categories expanded to include topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Some cluster names may need shortening for easier navigation](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Potential cleanup of unnecessary categories](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to review and approve new blog post topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Growth X to stage new content in Webflow CMS tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Update Looker dashboard with newly published blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Monitor Google indexing of new content](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Consider shortening some topic cluster names for improved navigation](https://fathom.video/share/irqcKHn_ZzhtrPd4W2zayB2gA8f-9QPC?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
